THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON JOHN H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS JENNIFER $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $513.00, DISMISS AS TO DEFT. FRANCIS MYERS WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NOT SERVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
